name: soweto-stays
description: Soweto Stays - property booking platform (MERN, TypeScript)

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/worker && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/db && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/worker && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
